Gucci Jackie Series Small Shoulder Bag
This brand-new Gucci Jackie Series shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and the included strap with red and green webbing add more styling possibilities to this small shoulder bag in light brown leather.
Model: 782849
Color: Light Brown Full Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm
